Interface MapCursor.Type

All Superinterfaces:
Comparable<MapCursor.Type>, Keyed, Keyed, OldEnum<MapCursor.Type>
Enclosing class:
MapCursor
public static interface MapCursor.Type extends OldEnum<MapCursor.Type>, Keyed
Represents the standard types of map cursors. More may be made available by resource packs - the value is used by the client as an index in the file './assets/minecraft/textures/map/map_icons.png' from minecraft.jar or from a resource pack.

    • valueOf

      @NotNull @Deprecated(since="1.21", forRemoval=true) @ScheduledForRemoval(inVersion="1.22") static @NotNull MapCursor.Type valueOf(@NotNull @NotNull String name)

      only for backwards compatibility, use Registry.get(NamespacedKey) instead.

    • values
